prompt: In the dormitory silence you examine your conscience: are you discerning priestly celibacy, or serving as a lay Dominican helper who may marry?

options.text: I will discern priestly vocation and embrace celibacy.
options.response: You resolve, before God, to keep celibacy while you discern priestly life.

options.text: I will serve as a lay Dominican helper and may pursue holy marriage.
options.response: You resolve to serve the priory as a lay helper; marriage remains a lawful vocation.

options.text: I am not ready. I will pray and decide later.
options.response: You postpone a final decision, asking for light and honesty.
